headline: ALL Q1 Deep Dive: Market Share Gains and Technology Investments Drive Strong Results
summary: Insurance giant Allstate (NYSE:ALL) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 3.2% year on year to $17.35 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $10.65 per share was 47% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
